modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble adding Coyote Card to GrubHub app

full_description_text:  
So, I was trying to figure out how to add my Coyote Card to the GrubHub app, but I just can't seem to get it to work. I thought it would be simple, but every time I try, it just doesn't go through. I'm not sure if I'm missing something or if there's a glitch or what, but it's really frustrating!
short_description: Trouble adding Coyote Card to GrubHub app
